div.h1: Matrix Layout: Row-Major vs Column-Major Access
div.p: 4×4 Matrix Storage and Cache Behavior for C = A × B

g.text: Matrix Multiply Mechanics: C = A x B

div.p: Memory order: row 0, then row 1, etc. Address formula: M[i][j] = base + i*4 + j
Memory order: col 0, then col 1, etc. Address formula: M[i][j] = base + j*4 + i
Each element C[i][j] is a dot product:
A 4x4 matrix fits in one cache line. Strided access hits the same L1 cache line anyway. But matrices grow:
